evals.prompt: Add comments to this complex retry logic function that implements exponential backoff with jitter.
evals.expected_output: Add JSDoc with @param, @returns, @example. Add inline comment explaining WHY jitter is added (prevents thundering herd), not WHAT the calculation does (code is self-explanatory). Remove any commented-out code — use git history instead.

evals.prompt: Write a README for our new authentication microservice.
evals.expected_output: README structure: (1) Mission — one-sentence purpose. (2) Prerequisites — exact runtime versions. (3) Installation — step-by-step commands. (4) Usage — copy-paste examples. (5) Known quirks and troubleshooting. Documentation ships with the feature, not after.

evals.prompt: I have TODO comments scattered throughout the code with no owner or ticket reference.
evals.expected_output: Violation: orphan TODOs. Every TODO needs (owner) and linked ticket: TODO(username): Fix race condition in payment flow — JIRA-1234. Add FIXME with ownership for bugs. Delete any TODO that's more than 6 months old without a ticket — if it mattered, it would have a ticket.

should_not_trigger: Optimize my database queries for better performance
Set up a CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions
Implement a rate limiter for the API
